title: Import data into existing portfolios

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Context
We have time tracking and budget data in other systems that needs to be imported in Monday on a weekly basis. We were able to do this using boards, but the Portfolio feature is missing this important feature.

We are having to revert back to boards because we’re not able to import data into existing items on Portfolios.

Link

Support

Import & export from Excel

6 min read Guide     So, your team has jumped on the bandwagon and has finally transferred its workflow to monday.com but... you still have some data and lists over in Excel. Don't worry... we...
